description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Vixl Simulator run that triggers on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow uses a self-hosted runner with x64 or ARMv8.4 architecture, checks out the code, sets up environment variables, updates the RootFS cache, checks out submodules, cleans and creates a build environment, configures CMake, builds the project, runs ASM tests with different configurations, and uploads test results as artifacts.
